full_text: An undated video has surfaced online showing a woman offering water to people in Gujarat's Rann near Jinjuwada. The clip shows a small child sitting in the area as she offers water to strangers amid the scorching heat. "Such an angel she is," wrote one Instagram user on the video. Another said, "This is so beautiful."
